revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Pregnant Ericka|Pregnant Ericka]] ([[User talk:Pregnant Ericka|talk]]) to last version by 73.93.5.246
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from high-use template
  |name=From a high-use template
  |from=a highly transcluded redirect to a template
  |info=**{{#invoke:High-use|text|risk|nobot=true}}
  |all category=Redirects from high-use templates
  |printworthy=no
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from high-use template
  |name=From a high-use template
  |from=a highly transcluded redirect to a template
  |info=**{{#invoke:High-use|text|risk|nobot=true}}
  |all category=Redirects from high-use templates
  |printworthy=no
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from high-use template |name=From a high-use template |from=a highly transcluded redirect to a template |info=**{{#invoke:High-use|text|risk|nobot=true}} |all category=Redirects from high-use templates |printworthy=no }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
